items.title: 'It was terrifying': Tumbler Ridge's tight-knit community in shock after shooting
items.dek: Members of the remote community have spoken of their fear and uncertainty after nine people were killed.
items.body: Members of the remote community have spoken of their fear and uncertainty after nine people were killed.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Powerful cyclone kills at least 20 as it tears through Madagascar port
items.dek: Madagascar's disaster management says roads are inaccessible with trees uprooted, power poles down and ninety percent of roofs ripped off.
items.body: Madagascar's disaster management says roads are inaccessible with trees uprooted, power poles down and ninety percent of roofs ripped off.
items.author: IriLine Desk
